verses.text: Topa in amau' kiima om gal khempeuh panin Israel mite tungah lungmuan'na a piak khit a sawtpi ciangin Joshua teekin a kum tampi pha ta hi
Joshua in Israel khempeuh, a upate leh a lutangte, a thukhente leh a uliante uh samin amaute kiangah, “Tu-in kei teekin ka kum tampi pha ta hi
Note' hangin Topa na Pasian un hih minam dangte khempeuh tungah a bawlnate na mu khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note-a' dingin hong dosakpa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi
En un, Jordan panin nitumna lama Tuipi Lian dong, a omlai minamte pen ka zawhsa minamte tawh na minamte uh gamh dingin note tungah kong pia khin hi
Topa na Pasian un note' mai-ah amaute lehnawt ding a, note' muhna panin hawkhia ding hi. Topa na Pasian un note' tungah hong ciam bangin amau' gam na luah ding uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin note lakah a omlai hih minamte tawh kihelloin, amau' pasian-te' thu zong genloin, tuate tawh zong kiciam loin, amau' na semloin, amaute' mai-ah zong note kunloin, ahih hangin tuni-a na gamtat bangun Topa na Pasian uh na belh theihna dingun Moses' thukham laibu sunga kigelhte khempeuh zui-in semin, themkhat zong pialloin na omna dingun khauhtakin om un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in note' mai-ah a lian a thahat minamte hawlkhia a, note ahih leh tuni dongin mi khat beek in hong nangzo nailo hi
Note tungah hong ciamsa bangin note-a' dingin hong dosakpa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahih manin note khat in mi tul khat na taikeeksak zo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh na it ding uh hoihtakin ngaihsun un
Bang hang hiam cih leh note nungkikin note lakah a omlai minamte tawh kipawlin amaute tawh kitengin, note in amau' numeite ten'pihin amaute in note' numeite a ten'pih leh

Topa na Pasian un note' mai-ah hih minamte hawlkhia nawnlo ding hi, ci-in teltakin thei un. Topa na Pasian un note hong piak hih leitang hoih panin na sih khit matengun amaute pen note-a' dingin thangzak leh tehlop, na nung uh a hong sat ciangduai, ahih kei leh na mit sung uh a hong sun ling tawh kibang ding uh hi

“Tu-in leitung mi khempeuh ngeina bangin kei a pai ding ka hi ta a, note khempeuh in na lungsim uh leh na nuntakna uhah, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai na hoih hong ciam khempeuh khat zong maimawklo ahihna na thei uh hi. A vekpi-in note-a' dingin hong tangtung a, khat zong maimawklo hi

Ahih hangin, amah in note hong thupiak ahi Topa na Pasian uh thuciamna palsatin, note in pasian dangte' na semin tuate na biak uh leh, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai-in a ciam na hoih khempeuh a tun' mah bangin Topa na Pasian un note hong piaksa hih leitang hoih panin amah in note hong suksiat khit matengin note tungah siatna khempeuh hong tungsak ding hi. Note tungah Topa hong sinso ding a, note tungah a hong piak leitang hoih panin note manlang takin na bei ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
